steps.cmd: set -eu; mkdir -p /tmp/ai-dev-control-center; ORIG_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); printf '%s' "$ORIG_BRANCH" > /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.orig-branch; echo "[1/9] 已进入 react18 目录: $(pwd)"; echo "[1/9] 当前分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; git fetch

set -eu; SPRINT_NUM=$(git branch -r | sed -nE 's#^[[:space:]]*origin/sprint-([0-9]+)$#\1#p' | sort -n | awk 'END{print}'); if [ -z "$SPRINT_NUM" ]; then echo "未找到远程 sprint 分支" >&2; exit 1; fi; SPRINT_BRANCH="sprint-$SPRINT_NUM"; printf '%s' "$SPRINT_NUM" > /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-num; printf '%s' "$SPRINT_BRANCH" > /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-branch; echo "[2/9] 目标 sprint 分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; if git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/heads/$SPRINT_BRANCH"; then git checkout "$SPRINT_BRANCH"; else git checkout -b "$SPRINT_BRANCH" "origin/$SPRINT_BRANCH"; fi; echo "[2/9] 已切换到 $SPRINT_BRANCH"
set -eu; IFS= read -r SPRINT_BRANCH < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-branch; echo "[3/9] 拉取 $SPRINT_BRANCH 最新代码"; git pull --ff-only origin "$SPRINT_BRANCH"

set -eu; IFS= read -r SPRINT_NUM < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-num; VERSION=$(npm view @chanjet/nova-uikit versions --json | SPRINT_NUM="$SPRINT_NUM" node -e 'let raw=""; process.stdin.on("data", (chunk) => raw += chunk); process.stdin.on("end", () => { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); const versions = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [parsed]; const sprint = process.env.SPRINT_NUM; const matched = versions.filter((v) => new RegExp(`^1\\.${sprint}\\.\\d+$`).test(v)).sort((a, b) => Number(a.split(".")[2]) - Number(b.split(".")[2])); if (!matched.length) { console.error(`未找到 1.${sprint}.y 格式的 @chanjet/nova-uikit 版本`); process.exit(1); } process.stdout.write(matched[matched.length - 1]); });'); printf '%s' "$VERSION" > /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.version; echo "[4/9] 命中的 nova 版本: $VERSION"

set -eu; IFS= read -r VERSION < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.version; VERSION="$VERSION" node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); const pkgPath = "package.json"; const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(pkgPath, "utf8")); const sections = ["dependencies", "devDependencies", "peerDependencies", "optionalDependencies", "resolutions"]; const targets = ["@chanjet/nova-athena", "@chanjet/nova-cross-shared", "@chanjet/nova-intelligent-import", "@chanjet/nova-microkernel", "@chanjet/nova-shared", "@chanjet/nova-uikit", "@chanjet/nova-uikit-compat"]; const updated = []; const missing = []; for (const name of targets) { let found = false; for (const section of sections) { if (pkg[section] && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(pkg[section], name)) { pkg[section][name] = process.env.VERSION; found = true; updated.push(`${section}:${name}`); } } if (!found) missing.push(name); } if (missing.length) { console.error(`package.json 缺少依赖: ${missing.join(", ")}`); process.exit(1); } fs.writeFileSync(pkgPath, `${JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2)}\n`); console.log(`已更新依赖: ${updated.join(", ")}`);'; echo "[5/9] package.json 已更新为 $VERSION"

set -eu; IFS= read -r VERSION < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.version; echo "[6/9] 当前变更:"; git status --short package.json; git add package.json; if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo "package.json 无需更新，未生成提交" >&2; exit 1; fi; git commit -m "修改nova版本号为$VERSION"; echo "[6/9] 提交完成: 修改nova版本号为$VERSION"
set -eu; IFS= read -r SPRINT_BRANCH < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-branch; echo "[7/9] 推送分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; git push -u origin "$SPRINT_BRANCH"
set -eu; IFS= read -r ORIG_BRANCH < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.orig-branch; echo "[8/9] 切回原分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; git checkout "$ORIG_BRANCH"

set -eu; IFS= read -r VERSION < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.version; IFS= read -r SPRINT_BRANCH < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-branch; IFS= read -r ORIG_BRANCH < /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.orig-branch; echo "[9/9] 全部步骤执行成功"; echo "[9/9] nova 版本: $VERSION"; echo "[9/9] sprint 分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; echo "[9/9] 已切回原分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; rm -f /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.orig-branch /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-num /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.sprint-branch /tmp/ai-dev-control-center/react18-nova.version
